calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-27-2006 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Determination Of Interest Of Maria Cano In Decedent'S Estate
Off Calendar Mar-27-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Brian Conners and John Mangini appearing for administrator. Franchesca Callejo appearing as guardian ad litem for the minors. Farley Toplen appearing for and with Maria Cano. Margarita, interpreter is also in court. Settlement agreement reached. Court is concerned on how the minor daughters are going to hold title. Mother will petition for guardianship. Court is concerned on how Ms. Cano is going to get the loan for the buyout when she does not have 100% interest and her conflict as guardian. All parties agree that Ms. Cano will quit claim the minors interest to Ms. Callejo and Ms. Callejo will hold it until guardianship is in place. Court will leave it to Ms. Callejo for recommendation for guardian. Language of order discussed. All parties agree to the language in the order. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Petition For Determination Of Interest Of Maria Cano In Decedent'S Estate
Off Calendar Mar-06-2006 Continued To Mar-27-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Brian Connors appearing for Maria Oseguera. Settlement reached after mediation. Court agreed to set the hearing on final distribution and approval of settlement agreement on 3/27 if petition is filed by 3/10. Matter is continued to 3/27. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Dec-05-2005 Denied

Petition To Select And Set Aside Probate Homestead
Off Calendar Dec-05-2005 Denied

Petition For Determination Of Interest Of Maria Cano In Decedent'S Estate
Off Calendar Dec-05-2005 Continued To Mar-06-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Suspension Of Powers And Removal Of Administrator And For Appointment Of Maria Cano As Administrator
Off Calendar Dec-05-2005 Denied

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-09-2005 Granted Per Written Order
